It’s time for Dubai Summer Surprises! 😄 

There are so many exciting events around the city, and one of the places you must visit is Ibn Battuta Mall! 

🛍 Amazing DSS sale 

⚫ Batman experiences - shows, activities, meet and greet. 2 to 10 pm until July 28. 

🎵 Entertainment for the whole family! 

Tag your family and friends!
